message:
feat(host): add operation cancellation controller with audit trail (46 tests)

Implements graceful operation cancellation with reason codes (user, agent,
timeout, resource limit, superseded, session closing), cleanup behaviors
(best-effort, full, abandon, checkpoint), partial result capture, and
checkpoint/resume support. Includes CancellationController for tracking
in-flight operations with a full audit log.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
